DescribeMetricDataLatest.resourceType: Cloud resource type, e.g. Instance. Not used as a query filter; only used to validate that filters include all required identifier attributes for the resource type
DescribeMetricDataLatest.filters: List of dimension filters; must include all Resource.Identifiers dimensions for the resource type
DescribeMetricDataLatest.filters.values: Multiple values, applicable to operator: in
DescribeMetricDataLatest.limit: Maximum number of time series to return when multiple match; default: 10, max: 100
DescribeMetricDataLatest.aggregationOverTime: Time-axis aggregation method; default: ["avg"], options: avg / sum / max / min / count
